chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1798 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8881/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.04.2025 Mr. Hamza Waheed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Fawad Chand, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Girdhari Mal, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-II, LTO, FBR, Karachi. Pursuant to last order, learned Commissioner is present. Notices impugned herein is stated to be violative of judgments of Division Bench of this court rendered in Pakistan International Freight of Forwarders Association vs. Province of Sindh, reported as 2017 PTD 1 and Pakistan Mobile Communication Limited v. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2022 PTD 266. Learned counsel for the petitioner relies upon another order of Division Bench of this court, dated 16.11.2023 passed in CP D 1318 of 2023 [OOCL Pakistan (Private) Limited vs. Sindh & Others] and states that since fate of judgments cited supra are in appeal before the honourable Supreme Court, therefore, it may be just and proper for the petitions to be disposed of with directions to the respondent not to proceed further with impugned notices till the matter is finally decided by the honourable Supreme Court and thereafter the parties may proceed in accordance with law. The Commissioner present articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Presence and assistance rendered by the Commissioner is appreciated.
Order accordingly. Presence and assistance rendered by the Commissioner is appreciated. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
